creator: gardenl@promisechina.com
text:
Hi, dear guys

 How can I add our EX SATA RAID series cards driver to FreeBSD for 
inclusion on the next distribution.

 Recently, we (Promise Technology) want to add our EX SATA RAID series 
cards driver to FreeBSD for inclusion on the next FreeBSD distribution.

 Please notify me about  what I should do and reply me a mail so kindly.
 Thanks.

 Regards,

 gardenliang (from Promise Technology)

Fix: 

no
How-To-Repeat: no
